reason: "Cute Puppy Flower" should not be translated as "søt valpeblomst". "Cute Puppy Flower" should be seen as two different segments. "Cute Puppy" go well together and can be translated as "Søt valp". "Flower" should be translated as "Blomst" and treated as its own segment.

source: The baseball cap really very cute.Suit for adult.
mt: Baseballhetten er veldig søt. Drakt for voksne.
pe: Baseballcapsen er veldig søt. Passer til voksne.
reason: I have changed "Baseballhetten" to "Baseballcapsen". In Norwegian the most commonly used translation of "Baseball Cap" is "Baseballcap", "Baseballcaps", "Baseballcapsen" etc. I have changed "Drakt for voksne" to "Passer til voksne". Note though: "Drakt for voksne" is technically the correct translation of "Suit for adult", but this translation does not fit the context. It seems like "Suit for adult" should actually be "suitable for adults", and is refering to the baseball cap and whether or not this would suit an adult person.

source: Please check your vacuum to make sure you are purchasing the correct parts.
mt: Sjekk støvsugeren for å forsikre deg om at du kjøper de riktige delene.

source: On Sale for a Limited Time!
mt: På salg i en begrenset periode!

source: 30 Volta Bolido 4500-4599 Style S Vacuum Bags - Replaces Volta S-Bag Vacuum Bags.
mt: 30 Volta Bolido 4500-4599 Style S vakuumposer - erstatter Volta S-Bag vakuumposer.
pe: 30 Volta Bolido 4500-4599 Style S støvsugerposer - erstatter Volta S-Bag støvsugerposer.
reason: wrong terminology used. "vakuumposer" should be "støvsugerposer"
